description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly black exterior and angular, stealth-inspired design. The wings are sharply swept and integrated into the fuselage, with small vertical stabilizers and visible weaponry or equipment mounted beneath each wing. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a clear canopy, and features a streamlined, low-profile shape. The rear of the airplane houses dual engine exhausts, suggesting a high-performance propulsion system. Subtle cyan-blue accent lights and panels are visible on the wings and fuselage, adding to its advanced appearance. The landing gear consists of multiple struts and wheels, visible beneath the wings and fuselage, indicating a tricycle configuration.
description: A futuristic, black, stealth-style airplane with swept wings, forward cockpit, and cyan-blue accent lights. Features dual rear engines and visible underwing equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, swept wings, forward cockpit, and underwing landing gear struts.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, forward cockpit canopy, and underwing mounted equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals dual engine exhausts, integrated wing design, and subtle cyan-blue lighting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the streamlined profile and underwing details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and no horizontal stabilizer extensions.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
